name: dodge-rush-mobile
description: Android (Expo) wrapper that ships the Dodge Rush web build offline inside a WebView.

scripts.logcat: PATH="${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}/platform-tools:$PATH" adb logcat ReactNativeJS:V chromium:V '*:S' | grep --line-buffered -v -iE 'not renderable|gles2_cmd_decoder|too many (gl )?errors|RENDER WARNING'
